org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard

Class StandardEdge<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractModelObject
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractEdge<G,N,A,E>
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard.StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph.
    N - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    A - is the type of the anchors inside the graph.
    E - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ModelObject>, Edge<G,N,A,E>, ModelObject, PropertyNames
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FSMTransition

    public class StandardEdge<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
extends AbstractEdge<G,N,A,E>
    Define an edge with the standard implementation.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void disconnect()
      Disconnect the edge from the anchors.

      Reply the end connection point.
      A getStartAnchor()
      Reply the begin connection point.

      Set the end connection point.

      Connect the end of this edge to this specified anchor.

      Set the begin connection point.

      Connect the beginning of this edge to this specified anchor.

        public StandardEdge()

    • Method Detail

      • getEndAnchor

        public A getEndAnchor()
        Reply the end connection point.
        Returns:
        connection point.

      • setEndAnchor

        public void setEndAnchor(A anchor)
        Set the end connection point.
        Parameters:
        anchor - connection point.

      • setEndAnchor

        final void setEndAnchor(A anchor,
                boolean testConnection)
        Connect the end of this edge to this specified anchor. This function is able to test or ignore the connection constraints on the anchor.
        Parameters:
        anchor -
        testConnection - is true to test the connection constrains; false to ignore them.

      • getStartAnchor

        public A getStartAnchor()
        Reply the begin connection point.
        Returns:
        connection port.

      • setStartAnchor

        public void setStartAnchor(A anchor)
        Set the begin connection point.
        Parameters:
        anchor - connection point.

      • setStartAnchor

        final void setStartAnchor(A anchor,
                  boolean testConnection)
        Connect the beginning of this edge to this specified anchor. This function is able to test or ignore the connection constraints on the anchor.
        Parameters:
        anchor -
        testConnection - is true to test the connection constrains; false to ignore them.

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
        Disconnect the edge from the anchors.
